_meta.description: SlideForge Campaign Presets v3 — function-named catalog. Presets are named by their emotional objective, not their topic domain. A preset named 'evidence_argument' works for political policy, business strategy, or academic thesis — the emotional engine is identical.
rhythm_principles: Never repeat the same slide_type consecutively (exception: within repeatable unit_slides, types may repeat across units)
Alternate dark/light bg_style for visual contrast (DLD pattern: Dark-Light-Dark)
Hook → Context → Evidence → Proof → Action arc
Dense data slides alternate with sparse narrative slides
CTA is always the final slide
Repeatable blocks create rhythm through variation-in-repetition: same structure, different content

repeatable_block_syntax.description: A repeatable block contains unit_slides that repeat N times with different content. The AI agent decides iteration count based on content depth. {{unit_index}} auto-increments (1, 2, 3, ...) for each iteration.

structure.unit_slides: array of slide objects with params_template

repeatable_block_syntax.variable_injection: {{unit_index}} is auto-incremented. All other {{variables}} are filled by the AI agent per iteration.

emotional_arc_fields.description: Every preset declares its emotional_arc (the psychological journey the reader travels) and persuasion_techniques (which influence principles are structurally embedded). These fields guide the AI agent's content generation — not just what slides to produce, but WHY they're sequenced that way.
emotional_arc_fields.emotional_arc: Comma-separated progression of emotional states, e.g. 'Curiosity → Understanding → Conviction → Action'
emotional_arc_fields.persuasion_techniques: Array of influence technique IDs. Known techniques: authority_transfer, social_proof, bandwagon, scarcity, contrast, fear_appeal, hope_appeal, cognitive_dissonance, narrative_transport, emotional_priming, commitment_escalation, reciprocity, plain_folks, identity_framing, reframing, evidence_stacking, transparency

presets.name: Announcement
presets.description: Announce a new product, feature, or milestone. Hook with impact, explain value, prove it works, close with access.
presets.rhythm: Hero → Problem → Features → Proof → CTA

presets.name: Authority Introduction
presets.description: Introduce an authority figure — a leader, expert, or brand — with credibility, values, and endorsements. Works for political candidates, CEOs, keynote speakers, nonprofit founders, or any figure needing trust established.
presets.rhythm: Image → Origin → Values → Positions → Endorsements → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration is a key position or priority: problem → solution → evidence

presets.name: Origin Story
presets.description: Tell the story of how something came to be. Works for brands, projects, movements, relationships, or ideas. Creates emotional connection through narrative.
presets.rhythm: Image → Story → Timeline → Values → Vision → CTA

presets.name: Credibility Cascade
presets.description: Stack social proof to build trust. Logo cloud → Multiple testimonials → Results metrics → CTA. The repetition of voices creates bandwagon momentum.
presets.rhythm: Logos → [Quote × N] → Data → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration is a testimonial. Alternate bg_style for visual variety.

presets.name: Proof Stacking
presets.description: Stack proof through multiple case studies. Each case is a complete unit: challenge → before/after → results → testimonial. Works for any domain where evidence accumulates.
presets.rhythm: Hook → [Case × N] → Aggregate Proof → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration is a complete case study: challenge → transformation → results → testimonial

presets.name: Process Transparency
presets.description: Show the process, craft, or methodology behind something. Builds trust through visibility. Works for manufacturing, creative work, research, cooking, engineering, any domain where process reveals quality.
presets.rhythm: Image → Process → Gallery → Values → Quote → CTA

presets.name: Product Showcase
presets.description: Showcase a product with features, gallery, reviews, and pricing. Works for any product — physical goods, digital products, services, courses, memberships.
presets.rhythm: Image → Features → Gallery → Reviews → Price → CTA

slides.description: Stack 2-3 reviews from different sources for credibility depth

presets.name: Evidence Narrative
presets.description: Lead with numbers and build a data-driven story. Metrics → Charts (repeatable) → Insights → CTA. Works for any domain where data tells the story.
presets.rhythm: Headline → Metric → [Chart + Insight × N] → Summary → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration pairs a chart with an insight callout for data → interpretation rhythm

presets.name: Evidence Argument
presets.description: Build a systematic case with repeatable evidence blocks. Problem statement → [Evidence × N] → Solution → Impact → CTA. Works for policy positions, business cases, research arguments, or any domain requiring structured persuasion.
presets.rhythm: Problem → [Evidence Block × N] → Solution → Impact → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration is an evidence block: data visualization + interpretation callout

presets.name: Contrast Analysis
presets.description: Compare two options analytically. Table → Visual compare → Features → Verdict. Works for product comparisons, methodology evaluations, strategy options, or any decision between alternatives.
presets.rhythm: Hook → Table → Visual → Features → Verdict → CTA

presets.name: Contrast Demonstration
presets.description: Aggressive side-by-side contrast. Their record vs our record. Uses comparison and before/after for maximum impact. Works when you need to show one option is clearly superior.
presets.rhythm: Hook → Theirs → Ours → Compare → Verdict → CTA

presets.name: Skill Transfer
presets.description: Teach a skill or walk through a process. Each step is a repeatable module with its own dedicated slides. Works for tutorials, onboarding, training, educational content.
presets.rhythm: Definition → [Step Module × N] → Checklist → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration is a complete learning module: section divider + visual + explanation

presets.name: Deep Dive
presets.description: Deep explanation of one concept, feature, or capability. Hook → What → How → Why It Matters → Proof → CTA. Works for feature explanations, concept breakdowns, methodology deep-dives.
presets.rhythm: Hook → Explanation → Visual → Process → Proof → CTA

presets.name: Principle Education
presets.description: Teach a behavioral model, psychological principle, or theoretical framework. Concept → Principles (repeatable) → Application → Practice → CTA. Works for any educational content that teaches underlying principles.
presets.rhythm: Concept → [Principle × N] → Application → Practice → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration is a principle: visual example + explanation + myth-busting

presets.name: Technique Mastery
presets.description: Teach persuasion, communication, or behavioral techniques. Principle → Mechanism → Example → Application → Ethics → CTA. Works for any skill that requires both technique and responsible use.
presets.rhythm: Principle → Mechanism → Example → Application → Ethics → CTA

presets.name: Wisdom Transmission
presets.description: Transmit wisdom, philosophy, or spiritual teaching. Concept → Teachings (repeatable) → Practice → Closing wisdom → CTA. Works for any philosophical, spiritual, or contemplative content.
presets.rhythm: Concept → [Teaching × N] → Practice → Wisdom → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration is a teaching: quote/insight + visual + explanation

presets.name: Contrarian Reframe
presets.description: Challenge conventional wisdom with evidence. Myth → Insight → Evidence points (repeatable) → New framework → CTA. Works for thought leadership, contrarian takes, paradigm challenges.
presets.rhythm: Myth → Insight → [Evidence × N] → Framework → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration presents one evidence point with a different visualization type

presets.name: Paradigm Shift
presets.description: Social or cultural critique with data-driven analysis. Observation → Data evidence (repeatable) → Reframe → Call to awareness. Works for any commentary that challenges assumed norms.
presets.rhythm: Observation → [Evidence × N] → Analysis → Reframe → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration presents evidence: data visualization + interpretation

presets.name: Transformation Arc
presets.description: Guide personal transformation. Current state → Desired state → Bridge (repeatable steps) → Proof → CTA. Works for self-improvement, habit change, mindset shifts, career pivots.
presets.rhythm: Current → Desired → [Step × N] → Proof → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration is a transformation step: section divider + visual

presets.name: Event Mobilization
presets.description: Mobilize for an upcoming event, webinar, or gathering. Hook → Agenda → Speaker → Outcomes → Register → CTA. Works for any event promotion.
presets.rhythm: Hook → Agenda → Speaker → Outcomes → Register → CTA

presets.name: Urgency Mobilization
presets.description: Drive urgent action through fear + hope. Urgency → What's at stake → Proof → How to act → Social proof → CTA. Works for deadlines, campaigns, crisis responses, time-sensitive calls to action.
presets.rhythm: Urgency → Stakes → Proof → How-To → Social Proof → CTA

presets.name: Collective Mobilization
presets.description: Build a collective movement. Problem → Who we are → What we want → How to join → Momentum → CTA. Works for community building, social movements, organizational change, grassroots campaigns.
presets.rhythm: Problem → Identity → Vision → Steps → Momentum → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration presents a fact or statistic that builds the case for action

presets.name: Story Journey
presets.description: Take the reader on a narrative journey with repeatable scenes. Opening hook → [Scene × N] → Climax → Resolution → CTA. Works for any story-driven content where narrative transport is the persuasion mechanism.
presets.rhythm: Hook → [Scene × N] → Climax → Resolution → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration is a scene: image + narrative text

presets.name: Emotional Engineering
presets.description: Systematic emotional manipulation arc. Fear → Evidence → Contrast → Hope → Proof → Action. Repeatable fear/hope beats. Works for any content that needs to move people through a specific emotional sequence toward action.
presets.rhythm: Fear → [Evidence × N] → Contrast → Hope → Proof → CTA
presets.emotional_arc: Fear → Urgency → Contrast → Hope → Trust → Commitment

slides.description: Each iteration builds the fear case: data + interpretation

presets.name: Guided Experience
presets.description: Guide a practice, meditation, or experiential journey. Intention → Preparation → Practice (repeatable stages) → Integration → CTA. Works for meditation guides, workshop facilitation, experiential learning, any content that guides participation.
presets.rhythm: Intention → Preparation → [Stage × N] → Integration → CTA
presets.emotional_arc: Stillness → Focus → Deepening → Opening → Peace → Action

slides.description: Each iteration is a practice stage: visual + instruction + focus point
